items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ The classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft body bag, with metal rope knots crafted using jewelry micro-casting aluminum🪢, and decorative beads made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you switch between elegance and fun💃, unpredictable. Classic and versatile, very temperament-enhancing, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying methods, the strap is adjustable, the original sheepskin feels soft and delicate, designed with a unisex style that breaks gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable use experience, the Andiamo that combines elegance and casual style perfectly interprets the look of "fashionable old money style".

items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ Featuring the classic Intrecciato woven technique for a soft body, the metal knot is crafted using jewelry-grade micro-cast aluminum🪢, and the decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you swing between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, making it very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, adjustable shoulder strap, original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style that breaks gender boundaries, offering a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly embodies the look of 'fashion old money'.

The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".
